## 🚀 What is The Agency Roster?

A massive collection of **808 specialized AI agent skills** that work with Hermes Agent, Claude Code, Cursor, and any AI tool that supports markdown-based skills. Each agent is a self-contained expert with deep domain knowledge.

## 📊 Divisions

| Division | Count | Examples |
|----------|-------|----------|
| 🔴 **Engineering** | 60+ | Frontend, Backend, Mobile, DevOps, Security |
| 🟡 **Data & Infrastructure** | 40+ | Data Science, ML, MLOps, Databases, Cloud |
| 🟢 **Design & Creative** | 30+ | UI/UX, Motion, 3D, Video, Audio |
| 🔵 **Business & Marketing** | 50+ | Growth, SEO, CRM, Sales, Monetization |
| 🟣 **Communication & Bots** | 20+ | WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Voice, Email |
| 🇩🇿 **Algeria-Specific** | 15+ | BaridiMob, Poste, Fintech DZ, Legal DZ |
| 🧠 **AI & Orchestration** | 30+ | Agent builder, Memory, RAG, Multi-agent |
| 🏥 **Sector-Specific** | 40+ | HealthTech, EdTech, FinTech, PropTech |
| ⚡ **Automation & Tools** | 30+ | n8n, Zapier, Make, Power Automate |
| 🔧 **Specialized Tech** | 50+ | Blockchain, Quantum, Robotics, IoT |
| 💰 **Startup & Freelance** | 20+ | Founder, Fundraising, Consulting, Agency |
| 🎯 **Quality & Testing** | 20+ | QA, Accessibility, Performance, Chaos |

## 🇩🇿 Algeria-Specific Agents

Specialized agents for the Algerian market:
- **BaridiMob** — CCP mobile payments, factures
- **Poste Algérie** — suivi colis, tarifs
- **Fintech DZ** — Edahabia, CIB, conformité
- **Legal DZ** — DPI, INAPI, marques
- **Tax & Accounting DZ** — TVA 19%, NIF, IRG
- **Paperasse DZ** — CNI, passeport, permis, casier
- **Heziri Orchestrator** — BotFlow DZ, WhatsApp, n8n, Ollama

## 🤖 Multi-Agent Orchestration

Agents for building and managing AI agent teams:
- **Agent Architect** — multi-agent design, tool use, memory, planning
- **Agent Orchestrator** — swarm patterns, debate, voting, delegation
- **Agent Memory System** — short/long-term, episodic, semantic, vector RAG
- **Agent Tool Builder** — function calling, MCP, validation
- **Agent Evaluator** — benchmarking, human eval, cost, safety
- **Agent Deployment** — containerization, scaling, versioning
- **Agent Security** — prompt injection, jailbreak prevention
- **Agent Testing** — unit/integration tests, guardrails, red teaming

## 💰 Monetization

- **Free**: Use all agents on GitHub (MIT License)
- **Premium Pack**: Gumroad ($29) — organized zip + documentation
- **Custom Setup**: Fiverr ($100-500) — personalized agent team setup

## 📦 Quick Start

1. Clone the repo:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/ziri22/agency-roster.git
```

2. Copy agents to your Hermes skills folder:
```bash
cp -r agency-roster/skills/business/agent-* ~/.hermes/skills/business/
```

3. Use with any AI tool — each agent is a markdown file with structured knowledge.

## 📈 Stats

- **808** specialized AI agent skills
- **12** major divisions
- **15+** Algeria-specific agents
- **20+** v2/v3 advanced versions
- **MIT License** — use anywhere
